name: kaitoi-studio
description: Build, run, and scale visual creative-production workflows from your AI agent — on the same canvas you work in visually.
long_description: Kaitoi Studio is a hybrid intelligence platform for creative work: a visual canvas where you design workflows and collaborate with an AI agent on the same workspace you use visually. This MCP server exposes Kaitoi Studio's workflow engine with 32 tools spanning graph authoring, node execution, custom-node development, Library and project management, Fal.ai documentation lookup, and web research. Agents can search for nodes, build and edit reusable graphs, run nodes or full workflows, validate custom Python nodes against Kaitoi's schema, and work across providers including Fal.ai, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, Stability AI, Replicate, Runway, Tripo3D, ElevenLabs, Freepik, Ollama, ComfyUI, and more. Instead of a single-purpose generation API, Kaitoi gives agents a broad multimodal environment for creating and processing images, video, audio, 3D assets, documents, web apps, embeddings, plots, and more. Currently in Private Beta.

auth.description: Per-user bearer token minted in Kaitoi Studio under Settings → MCP. Revocable, with a 365-day default lifetime.
